title: Parent Phase A1 — Status Code Semantics Fix
execution_plan_ref: docs/platform/EXECUTION_PLAN.md - M365 CPS Track A P1

principles: Tool-first determinism (capability surface must equal advertised surface)
Operator observability (the system must explain its own state)
Plan-first execution with strict per-phase gates
anti_alignment: Mutation fence on actual write actions stays on
Risk-tier classification per agent stays unchanged
Two-phase confirmation gate for high-risk mutations stays on

user_stated_requirements: Fix _denial_to_status to preserve unknown_action as a distinct status (not mutation_fence). Plumb the new status through M365 runtime and UCP tools surface. Unit + integration tests.
intent_capture.intent_verification: Tasks T1..T8 together satisfy this parent phase's objective.

objective: Fix _denial_to_status to preserve unknown_action as a distinct status (not mutation_fence). Plumb the new status through M365 runtime and UCP tools surface. Unit + integration tests.
current_state: Parent phase scope draft; no implementation yet.
target_state: All child tasks complete; GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkA.

in_scope: Read context for status code semantics
Update UCP m365_tools.py to surface unknown_action
Add M365 unit tests for unknown_action
Add UCP unit tests for unknown_action routing
Pre-commit + make test in both repos
file_denylist: UCP: any file outside src/ucp/m365_tools.py and tests/
Any file not in allowlist of the active child-phase task

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R1; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R8; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

tasks.name: Read context for status code semantics
tasks.description: Read M365 src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py, actions.py end-to-end. Read UCP src/ucp/m365_tools.py. Document current _denial_to_status mapping behavior in commit notes.
deliverables: Read confirmation logged in implementation_notes of this task
exit_criteria: All three files read; current behavior documented

tasks.name: Update _denial_to_status to preserve unknown_action
tasks.description: In M365 src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py, change the unknown_action branch return value from 'mutation_fence' to 'unknown_action'. Preserve all other branches exactly.
tasks.validation_command: .venv/bin/python -c "from m365_runtime.graph.registry import _denial_to_status; assert _denial_to_status('unknown_action') == 'unknown_action'; assert _denial_to_status('mutation_fence') == 'mutation_fence'; assert _denial_to_status('permission_missing') == 'permission_missing'; assert _denial_to_status('auth_mode_mismatch') == 'auth_required'; assert _denial_to_status('foo') == 'policy_denied'; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Align actions.py callsite
tasks.description: Verify ActionInvocation.status_class plumbs the new 'unknown_action' value through unchanged. No code change expected; this is a verification + assertion task.
deliverables: Confirmation that no callsite remaps unknown_action
exit_criteria: grep -r 'unknown_action' in actions.py shows no remapping
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && grep -n 'unknown_action' src/m365_runtime/graph/actions.py || echo 'no remap callsites - OK'

tasks.name: Update UCP m365_tools.py to surface unknown_action
tasks.description: In UCP src/ucp/m365_tools.py, ensure the _m365_execute path surfaces status_class == 'unknown_action' without remapping it back to mutation_fence.
exit_criteria: grep on m365_tools.py shows no 'mutation_fence' substitution for unknown_action

tasks.name: Add M365 unit tests for unknown_action
tasks.description: Add test_unknown_action_returns_unknown_action_status in tests/test_m365_pack_client.py. Update any existing tests that asserted mutation_fence on unknown actions.
deliverables: Updated existing tests that assumed unknown -> mutation_fence

tasks.name: Add UCP unit tests for unknown_action routing
Pre-commit + make test in both repos
tasks.description: Run pre-commit run --all-files in both repos. Run make test in both repos. Fix any issues.
deliverables: make test green in both repos
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test && cd $UCP_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test

tasks.name: Commit child phases (no push)
tasks.description: Create commits in both repos with message format 'plan:m365-cps-trkA-p1: T1-T7 status code semantics'. No push.
exit_criteria: git log --oneline -1 shows the commit message in both repos
tasks.validation_command: cd $UCP_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkA-p1' && cd $M365_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkA-p1'

checks.name: Parent phase A1 integration
checks.description: All child tasks T1..T8 green; integration test pass

no_go_triggers: Any child task fails its validation_command

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not skip or reorder tasks (Section 7 strict ordering).
Do not modify thresholds or invariants to make gates green without owner approval.
Do not execute until plan status is approved.
Reference plan:{plan-id}:{task-id} in all action log entries and commits.
Do not add tasks, gates, or deliverables not in this plan without owner approval.
Call validate_action MCP tool before any write operation (UCP server).
Each child phase commits locally; no push until parent-phase GATE is green.
Each parent-phase GATE pushes to feat/m365-cps-trk{X} branch only.
Each track GATE merges to development (UCP) and main (M365) only after live tenant smoke green.
